hero.title: Hi, I'm Abdulkerim Işık
hero.subtitle: Computer Engineering Student | Medeniyet University
hero.description: Passionate developer creating innovative solutions with modern web technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.description: I'm a Computer Engineering student at Medeniyet University with a passion for creating innovative solutions using modern web technologies.

education.title: Education
education.description: I'm a 2nd year Computer Engineering student at Medeniyet University. In my courses, I study modern programming languages, data structures, algorithms, and web technologies.

goals.title: My Goals
goals.description: My priority is to continuously develop myself in the software world, use modern technologies effectively, and produce user-oriented solutions. I want to contribute to open source projects and share knowledge with the community.

skills.title: Skills & Technologies
skills.description: Specializing in modern technologies and continuous learning is my core principle. Here are the technologies I use and my expertise levels.
skills.hoverText: You can contact me to learn more about my projects and experiences with {{skill}}.
